title: Domain Separation Test Vectors - Multi-Party Authorisation
description: RFC 6979 deterministic ECDSA signatures with SIGIL-MPA-V1 domain tag
signature_format: Fixed 64-byte (r || s), low-S normalized per BIP-62

vectors.name: MPA approval signature
vectors.description: Device signs decrypted action context JSON with MPA domain tag
vectors.message_description: Canonical JSON action context (no whitespace, sorted keys)
vectors.verification: Server verifies device approval signature using same tag + actionContextJSON

invalid_cases.name: Wrong domain tag (auth tag used for MPA)
invalid_cases.reason: Signature produced with SIGIL-AUTH-V1 will not verify against SIGIL-MPA-V1

invalid_cases.name: Non-canonical JSON (different whitespace)
invalid_cases.reason: Different byte representation produces different hash, signature fails
